backend/main.mo: Motoko actor storing admission submissions in a Map, allowing public creation and admin‑restricted listing.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two homepage animation features to touched files, components, tests, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summary list describing key frontend files, their roles, and notable UI or feature behaviors.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base setup defining CSS variables for light/dark themes and global background/foreground styling.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell loading the React app via main.tsx into the root element.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React router setup wiring all top-level pages and wrapping the app in theme and class‑selection providers.
frontend/src/components/admissions/Admis: Admissions enquiry form using react‑hook‑form and a mutation hook to submit data to the backend.
frontend/src/components/learning/Alphabe: Scrollable grid selector for choosing letters or numbers with playful button animations.
frontend/src/components/learning/ClassSe: Dropdown component bound to ClassSelectionContext for choosing a class level.
frontend/src/components/learning/Tracing: Canvas-based writing practice tool allowing guided tracing, variable stroke width, undo, and clear actions.
frontend/src/components/math/MathSection: Renders math sections as tabs and displays PracticeCard components for each problem.
frontend/src/components/math/PracticeCar: Interactive math practice card allowing answer input, checking, and showing explanations.
Displays GK questions in an accordion list with answers revealed on expand.
frontend/src/components/rhymes/RhymeCard: Shows rhyme info and triggers playback via a Play button.
frontend/src/components/rhymes/RhymePlay: Modal player for rhyme audio/video with optional lyrics display.
frontend/src/components/site/AnimatedSec: Applies scroll-based reveal animations to wrapped content.
frontend/src/components/site/BrandLogo.t: Displays the school logo with hover animation and text.
frontend/src/components/site/Footer.tsx: Site footer with attribution, branding, and description text.
frontend/src/components/site/GenderSelec: Toggle buttons to switch between girl and boy theme modes.
frontend/src/components/site/HeaderNav.t: Header navigation with desktop links, mobile menu, logo, and gender selector.
Page layout wrapper providing header, footer, and routed content.
frontend/src/components/site/SubjectIcon: Renders a subject-specific icon from a sprite sheet.
frontend/src/components/social/TopicCard: Card component presenting a social studies topic with optional content.
frontend/src/content/contact.ts: Defines contact info object with address, email, phone, and social links.
frontend/src/content/gk.ts: Provides GK question sets per class level with IDs, questions, and answers.
frontend/src/content/math.ts: Defines math problem and section interfaces and provides grade-specific math content with simple questions and answers.
frontend/src/content/rhymes.ts: Defines a rhyme interface and exports a list of nursery rhymes with titles, descriptions, and lyrics.
frontend/src/content/socialStudies.ts: Defines social studies topic and question structures and provides grade-wise topics and Q&A content.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages a backend actor tied to the user's Internet Identity and refreshes dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateAdmissionSub: Provides a mutation hook to submit admission forms through the backend actor and invalidate related queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity context, handling login, logout, stored identity loading, and exposing identity state to components.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind-based global styles defining light, dark, and gender‑themed CSS variables for the app's design system.
frontend/src/learning/classLevels.ts: Defines class level types, metadata, and helper functions for retrieving labels and display names.
frontend/src/learning/ClassSelectionCont: Provides a React context for storing and persisting the selected class level using sessionStorage.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/AdmissionsPage.tsx: Renders the admissions form and a success screen after submission.
frontend/src/pages/AlphabetNumbersPage.t: Allows users to pick letters or numbers and practice tracing them on a canvas.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Displays contact details including address, email, phone, and social links in styled cards.
Shows GK questions based on the selected class with a class selector and animated sections.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home landing page featuring hero content and links to learning sections.
frontend/src/pages/LearnPage.tsx: Renders the main learning hub with class selection and cards linking to different learning modules. Uses animated sections and themed icons.
frontend/src/pages/MathematicsPage.tsx: Displays math practice content filtered by selected class with animated header, class selector, and tabbed sections.
frontend/src/pages/RhymesPage.tsx: Shows a grid of rhyme cards and opens a player for the selected rhyme with simple state management.
frontend/src/pages/SocialStudiesPage.tsx: Loads class‑specific social studies topics and Q&A, showing them in animated grids and lists.
frontend/src/theme/GenderThemeContext.ts: Implements a context for storing and applying gender-based themes, persisting the value and updating DOM attributes.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helpers for reading/storing URL parameters and persisting them in sessionStorage, including hash-based routing support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending colors, animations, fonts, and container settings for the project’s custom theme.
project_state.json: Defines current project state, requirements, known issues, and planned features for the educational website.
